CAST YOUR MIND.Definition: try to remember something from the past

RATCHETING UP A NOTCH.Definition: increasing a little; becoming stronger or more intense

INFLATION.Definition: a rise in prices over time

TABLOID.Definition: a newspaper with short stories, big headlines, and often gossip

TRAPS.Definition: situations that can trick you or cause problems

PROMPTS.Definition: instructions or questions that tell an AI what to do

DISCLAIMERS.Definition: statements that explain limits or warnings

PILLARS.Definition: the main parts that support something important

FRAMING.Definition: the way something is explained or organised

FRAMEWORK.Definition: a simple structure or system for understanding it

INTEGRATION.Definition: the act of combining something into a larger system

SURPRISE SURPRISE.Definition: a phrase used when something expected happens

TRICKY.Definition: difficult in a small or confusing way

INTERRUPT.Definition: stop it while it is speaking

LEAPS AND BOUNDS.Definition: very quickly and by a large amount

PATIENT.Definition: calm and able to wait without getting angry

PAINFULLY.Definition: in a very uncomfortable or annoying way

ADAPT.Definition: change in order to fit the new situation

MUMBLING.Definition: speaking in a low or unclear way

RAW.Definition: natural and not edited or polished

DEMOS.Definition: short demonstrations that show how it works

TENSE.Definition: a form of a verb that shows time (past, present, future)

PUT YOU OUT OF YOUR MISERY.Definition: end a period of waiting or uncertainty

TEMPTING.Definition: making you want to use it

DISTILL.Definition: take the most important ideas or parts from them

CROSS OUT.Definition: draw a line through something to show it is wrong

HINTS.Definition: clues or information that help you find the answer

OUTSOURCING.Definition: getting someone or something else to do your work

STRUGGLE.Definition: difficult effort, have difficulty handling it

DAUNTING.Definition: very frightening or making you feel nervous

STEPPING STONE.Definition: something that helps you reach a bigger goal

BOMBARDED.Definition: subjected to or faced with a lot of them very quickly

AGENDA.Definition: a personal plan or goal it wants to follow

DISTRACTED.Definition: not able to focus because something takes its attention

SLANG.Definition: very informal words used in everyday speech

STAGE.Definition: the place where a performance happens

REASSURING.Definition: making you feel calmer or less worried

PROMPT.Definition: an instruction or text that tells an AI what to do

OVERWHELMING.Definition: feeling like it is too much to deal with

CONSISTENCY.Definition: doing it regularly in the same way

ATTITUDE.Definition: the way someone thinks or feels about it
